    def __init__(self, name, size):
        self.name = name
        self.size = size
        self.type = PRIMITIVE_TYPES.get(name, ctypes.c_char)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f'{self.name}({self.size})'

    def __eq__(self, other):
        return self.name == other.name and self.size == other.size
